description_long: This delivery robot features a whimsical, retro-futuristic design reminiscent of a British police box, with a green, gabled roof and vertical paneling. The front is equipped with two articulated mechanical arms ending in claw-like grippers, and two large cylindrical tanks are mounted on the sides, suggesting a powered or pneumatic system. The main body has a prominent door with a red frame and window panes, which can swing open to reveal the interior cargo space. The robot stands on a single large wheel at the base, with additional stabilizing appendages visible. The exterior is primarily green with metallic and red accents, and the overall construction appears robust and industrial. The design suggests both functional delivery capability and a playful, eye-catching presence suitable for urban environments.
description: A green, retro-styled delivery robot with a gabled roof, mechanical arms, side tanks, and a prominent red-framed door, standing on a large wheel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green gabled roof, red-framed door, two side tanks, and articulated mechanical arms with claw grippers.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open red door, the side tanks, and the mechanical arms, with the wheel and roof visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the robot, the open door, the tanks, and the single large wheel at the base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel, the tanks, and the mechanical arms, with the door open and the wheel visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: One large central wheel at the base, likely a drive wheel, with additional stabilizing appendages; no visible treads or suspension.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A large, red-framed door with window panes on the front, hinged on the left side, serving as the access panel for the cargo compartment.
